final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: architectural-visualization
Asset type: interior design render, residential living room
Primary request: modern living room blending Scandinavian minimalism with Japanese wabi-sabi aesthetics
Scene/backdrop: spacious living room with large floor-to-ceiling windows, blurred green foliage visible outside
Subject: low-profile linen off-white fabric sofa with assorted textured throw pillows, irregular-shaped natural stone coffee table with raw edges, tall fiddle-leaf fig plant in corner, slender curved arc floor lamp, curated bookshelf with selected books and ceramic pieces
Style/medium: architectural visualization render, photorealistic interior rendering
Composition/framing: wide establishing shot, eye-level perspective showing full room layout
Lighting/mood: abundant natural daylight streaming through windows, soft and diffused ambient light, serene and contemplative atmosphere
Color palette: white and light gray dominant, pale white oak wood tones, off-white linen, natural stone grays, muted ceramic earth tones, soft green from plants
Materials/textures: matte white painted walls, light white oak solid wood flooring with visible grain, natural linen fabric, raw edge stone with organic texture, ceramic with imperfect handmade quality, glossy fiddle-leaf fig leaves
Constraints: maintain minimalist "less is more" philosophy, preserve wabi-sabi imperfection aesthetic, keep natural light as primary illumination
Avoid: cluttered decor, synthetic materials, bright saturated colors, harsh artificial lighting, perfect symmetry, plastic plants, ornate furniture
